pi_items.source: Task description line 1, verified against export_result.sh line 62 and verifier.py line 64
Task description line 7, verified in setup_task.sh line 11, export_result.sh line 10, and export_result.sh line 44

Verifier code line 84: checks 'if any(r >= 3 for r in res)' where res is [points_u, points_v, points_w]. At least one axis must have >= 3 control points. Task description states 'at least 3' which is consistent.

Verifier code line 102 explicitly checks 'if deformation > 0.1:' to award 25 points for deformation. Export script (line 125) calculates deformation_score as sum of point deltas. Metadata claims 0.5 but verifier uses 0.1 threshold.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a 3D text object with content 'GALAXY', extruded in depth, and deforming it using a Blender Lattice modifier. The expected output file is '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/lattice_warp.blend'. Verification checks that the lattice has at least 3 control points on at least one axis (U, V, or W). Deformation is detected when lattice points are moved from their default positions with a cumulative displacement greater than 0.1 units (not 0.5 as metadata claims). All created content is procedurally generated within Blender, making it synthetic data.
